headline: VULCAN MATERIALS TO OUTLINE NEW GROWTH AND PROFITABILITY TARGETS AT 2026 INVESTOR DAY
summary: Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE: VMC), the nation's largest producer of construction aggregates, will set new cash gross profit per ton and earnings targets and outline its strategy for winning the future in aggregates at its 2026 Investor Day event today in New York City. Details about the event, including instructions for the webcast, are provided below.
